proposal_text:
Title: The Last Resonance
Concept: Uncover the past. Reclaim humanity's lost song.
Website Product Description: In a world shattered by catastrophe, not only cities lie in ruins, but the very fabric of human memory and connection has been torn apart. "The Last Resonance" invites you on an unforgettable journey to piece together the profound story of what was lost. Using unique "audio archaeology," you'll decipher lingering sounds and sonic memories, bringing a forgotten world back to life through its echoes. Beyond just listening, you'll interpret fragmented visual clues, much like a mosaic, and experience the 'empathetic imprints' of those who came before. Every discovery and every choice you make holds immense weight, shaping your own emotional resilience and the world's recovery. This is not a story of combat, but of profound discovery, emotional survival, and the enduring human spirit. Can you find the last resonance and help humanity rediscover its shared heart?

Title: Echoes of Dominion
Concept: Command the Shadows. Bear the Consequence.
Website Product Description: Dive into "Echoes of Dominion," a unique strategy experience where the battlefield is the human mind and the weapon is influence itself. As a master strategist, you will command not armies, but the very currents of collective thought, shaping beliefs and perceptions across vast populations. Operate from the shadows, orchestrating intricate webs of empathy or manipulation to achieve your profound objectives. Every subtle, indirect move you make carries significant emotional weight, creating an unparalleled sense of control as you subtly guide the destinies of nations and ideas.

But beware, for with this immense, unseen power comes equally immense responsibility. Witness the stark reality of unintended consequences, where even the most brilliant plans can lead to raw vulnerability and crushing despair. "Echoes of Dominion" offers an intensely engaging and psychologically rich journey, challenging you to master the art of unseen power while confronting the lasting impact of your choices on the very fabric of society.
